readCarefully: Please read these terms carefully before using the HealthPortal management system.
contactCounsel: For privacy requests or legal inquiries, please contact our counsel:

privacy.introText: This Privacy Policy explains how HealthPortal collects, uses, retains, and protects your personal data. We are committed to transparency and your data rights.
privacy.section1Content: HealthPortal ('we' or 'us') is committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring you have a positive experience on our platform. This Privacy Policy outlines our practices regarding data collection, usage, retention, and your rights. We comply with applicable data protection regulations including the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and maintain strict security protocols to safeguard your personal and medical information.
privacy.section2Content: We collect data necessary to provide healthcare services, including: Patient information (name, contact details, medical history, insurance); Appointment data (dates, times, doctors visited, reason for visit); Payment information (transaction records, wallet details, payment methods); Usage analytics (app interactions, device type, IP address); and Communications (SMS reminders, notifications, emails). We only collect data directly from you or as authorized by you. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.section3Content: We retain your personal and medical data for 2 weeks following account deletion or request for data removal. After this period, all identifiable information is permanently deleted from our active systems. However, aggregated and anonymized data may be retained for statistical and compliance purposes. Medical records may be retained longer if required by local healthcare regulations, which will be communicated to you separately.
privacy.section4Content: You have the right to request deletion of your personal data at any time. To delete your account and data: 1) Use the 'Delete Account' button in your account settings within the HealthPortal app; 2) Your data will be marked for deletion immediately; 3) Complete deletion occurs within 2 weeks. You will receive a confirmation email when your deletion request is processed. For additional assistance, contact our privacy team at privacy@healthportal.com. We will honor deletion requests within legally required timeframes.
privacy.section5Content: You have the right to: (1) Access your personal data and receive a copy upon request; (2) Correct inaccurate or incomplete information; (3) Request deletion of your data subject to legal retention requirements; (4) Restrict processing of your data for certain purposes; (5) Port your data to another service provider in a structured format; (6) Withdraw consent at any time without penalty; and (7) Lodge complaints with relevant data protection authorities. To exercise these rights, contact privacy@healthportal.com with your request details.
privacy.section6Content: If you are a California resident, you have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act: (1) Right to Know what personal information we collect, use, and share; (2) Right to Delete your personal information, subject to certain exceptions; (3) Right to Opt-Out of the sale or sharing of your personal information for targeted advertising; and (4) Right to Non-Discrimination - we do not discriminate against you for exercising your CCPA rights. We will not deny services, charge different prices, or reduce service quality based on your privacy choices. To submit a CCPA request, email privacy@healthportal.com with 'CCPA Request' in the subject line.
privacy.section7Content: We process your data under the following legal bases: (1) Contract Performance - providing healthcare services you've requested; (2) Consent - when you explicitly agree to our data practices; (3) Legal Obligation - complying with healthcare, tax, and data protection laws; (4) Legitimate Interest - improving our services and ensuring platform security; and (5) Vital Interests - protecting your health and safety in medical emergencies. You may withdraw consent for non-essential processing at any time through your account settings.
privacy.section8Content: For privacy inquiries, data access requests, deletion requests, or to exercise your CCPA rights, contact our Privacy & Compliance Team at privacy@healthportal.com or write to: HealthPortal Data Protection Officer, Legal & Compliance Department, HealthPortal Enterprise Solutions, HQ Compliance Address. Response time: We will respond to all data requests within 30 days as required by law. Updates: This Privacy Policy is effective as of May 22, 2026 and may be updated periodically. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification.
privacy.ccpaRightDesc1: Know what personal information is collected, used, and shared about you.
privacy.ccpaRightDesc2: Request deletion of your personal information, subject to legal exceptions.
privacy.ccpaRightDesc3: Opt out of the sale or sharing of your personal information for targeted ads.
privacy.ccpaRightDesc4: We do not discriminate for exercising your CCPA rights.
privacy.dataRetentionContent: User data is retained for 2 weeks after account deletion. Active accounts retain data to provide ongoing services. Aggregated, anonymized data is retained for statistical and compliance purposes without any personally identifiable information. Medical records may be retained longer if required by local healthcare regulations. You can monitor your data retention timeline in your account settings.
privacy.contactContent: For any questions about this Privacy Policy, your data, or to exercise your rights:

landing.heroTitle: Book appointments, find doctors, manage care, and pay securely.
landing.heroSubtitle: The ultimate healthcare platform connecting patients, doctors, and hospitals seamlessly.
landing.searchDesc: Find the right doctor or hospital for your needs.
landing.chooseDesc: Select a time that works for you.

content.eligibilityText: By accessing the platform, whether as a patient, receptionist, manager, owner, or other authorized staff, you agree to be responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
content.medicalDisclaimerText: This service is NOT for emergencies. The platform facilitates healthcare management but does not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or a doctor's judgment.
content.appointmentsText: Appointments are subject to hospital-specific policies. Users must adhere to rules regarding booking, rescheduling, cancellation, and no-show handling. Repeated no-shows may lead to account restrictions.
content.paymentsText: We support wallet top-ups and various payment methods secured via OTP verification. Users are responsible for maintaining sufficient funds. We outline procedures for failed payments, transaction records, and applicable refund policies.
content.privacyText: We collect patient, appointment, and payment data necessary for providing our services. We implement strict role-based access controls ensuring only authorized personnel view sensitive data.
content.notificationsText: You consent to receive SMS, OTPs, reminders, payment alerts, and essential service messages. You may opt out of non-essential communications where applicable.
content.thirdPartyText: We integrate with third-party payment and messaging providers. We are not liable for outages, delays, or limitations caused by these external services.
content.prohibitedText: Any unauthorized access, tampering with staff tools, attempting to reverse-engineer the platform, or misuse of data is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate termination.
content.suspensionText: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts violating these terms. Records will be retained as required by law for medical and financial compliance.
content.governingLawText: These terms shall be governed by the applicable laws of the jurisdiction where the hospital operates. Disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration or local courts.
